Index idx_message_projection_jobs_status_updated already exists — stale 'no index' claim

activity-message.test.ts has same missing status assertion as TC-08 — test-gap section too narrow
Path B materially misdiagnosed — direct-message.ts and activity-message.ts already write Firebase inline before shadow-write; inline-vs-batch question is on wrong premise
Residual 'no index' claim in Data & Contracts section — internally inconsistent with Engineering Coverage Matrix fix
Scope bounded to 'three files' — direct-message.ts and activity-message.ts are load-bearing and must be in scope

findings.message: Outcome contract still describes 'jobs picked up by a processor' — wrong problem given verified inline Firebase write design
Coverage-gap section stale — still says assert 'pending' while task seeds say fix to 'projected'
Default recommendation overstates replay benefit for activity-channel jobs — replay API rejects non-direct threads
Analysis handoff inconsistent — said 'open architectural question' but inline-vs-batch already resolved as moot
